name: 67oz Glass Pitcher with Stainless Steel Lid - Threshold™: Dishwasher-Safe Drink Server for Hot or Cold Beverages
description:
Enjoy your favorite beverages with the graceful and stylish Glass Pitcher With Stainless Steel Lid from Threshold™. Made from dishwasher-safe glass, this cylindrical pitcher helps enhance your everyday or special-occasion sipping with the clarity of the clear glass. Topped with a stainless-steel strainer lid with double outlets to pour your water, juice or tea, the versatile pitcher has an easy-to-pour spout and a sealing ring around the inside lip to ensure drip-free use. Perfect for all kinds of hot and cold beverages, the pitcher has a large handle that makes it a breeze to serve your favorite beverage on any occasion.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.

100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
